text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Gaaah! Dang it, I lost! I didn't stand a chance!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That was some real competition... Guess this
means my opponents were a lot stronger than me!
choice_data_list: Let's get some more training in!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know! Stopping now just doesn't feel
right!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We've gotta use today as fuel for our next
victory!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
If my foes are this strong, I've gotta get even
stronger! I'll come back swingin' every time until
sweet victory is mine!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've got this! I'll use this setback as a springboard
to get even faster!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It goes without saying! I'm not gonna let 'em push
me around forever!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: My legs know no limits! I'm gonna train till I drop!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I don't plan on lettin' up—everyone on that track
is in for a beatdown!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna treat the crowd to a race so hot, their
blood will start pumpin' too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready to go, Teach! I'm gonna jump squat the
whole way back!
